description:
## Component: hx-text-input (UPGRADE) **Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries** Upgrade existing scaffold to production-grade text input with full Drupal Form API integration via ElementInternals. ### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component) Per ADR-001 hybrid strategy: **Properties** control validation state, input type, and form behavior. **Slots** allow Drupal editorial control over labels, help text, and error formatting. See `apps/docs/src/content/docs/drupal-integration/twig/slots.md` for the hybrid form pattern. ### API Design **Properties:** - `name`: string (form field name) - `value`: string - `type`: text | email | password | tel | url | search | number | date - `label`: string (can also use default slot) - `placeholder`: string - `required`: boolean - `disabled`: boolean - `readonly`: boolean - `minlength` / `maxlength`: number - `pattern`: string (regex validation) - `autocomplete`: string - `error`: string (error message, can also use error slot) - `help-text`: string (can also use help slot) - `hx-size`: sm | md | lg **Slots:** - Default slot: Label text (alternative to label property) - `prefix`: Icon or text before input - `suffix`: Icon or text after input - `help`: Help text below input (alternative to help-text property) - `error`: Error message (alternative to error property) **CSS Parts:** - `input`: The native input element - `label`: Label element - `help-text`: Help text container - `error-message`: Error message container - `prefix` / `suffix`: Addon containers **Events:** - `hx-input`: Fires on input (composed: true) — for Drupal AJAX debounce - `hx-change`: Fires on change (composed: true) — for Drupal AJAX callbacks ### Drupal Integration ```twig {# Form API render element (see forms/form-api.md) #} Patient Full Name Enter first and last name as it appears on insurance card {# AJAX integration via custom events #} {# Drupal listens to hx-change for AJAX callbacks #} ``` ### ElementInternals Integration - `static formAssociated = true` - `setFormValue()` on every input event - `setValidity()` for constraint validation - Works inside native `
` and `` Light DOM wrapper - See `apps/docs/src/content/docs/drupal-integration/forms/form-api.md` - See `apps/docs/src/content/docs/drupal-integration/forms/element-plugin.md` for custom Drupal FormElement plugin pattern ### Healthcare Use Cases - Patient intake forms (name, MRN, DOB) - Prescription entry fields - Insurance information capture - Clinical note fields ### Acceptance Criteria 1. ElementInternals form participation (setFormValue, setValidity) 2. All input types render correctly (text, email, tel, date, etc.) 3. Validation states: error, required indicator, pattern validation 4. Prefix/suffix slots for icons and addons 5. Label + help text + error message layout with design tokens 6. `hx-input` and `hx-change` events fire with composed: true 7. Works in Drupal Form API via custom render element 8. Storybook stories for all states and types 9. WCAG 2.1 AA: label association, error announcement, focus management
title: T1-05: hx-text-input — Single-Line Text Field

coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 5**

> [!CAUTION]
> Some comments are outside the diff and can’t be posted inline due to platform limitations.
> 
> 
> 
> <details>
> <summary>⚠️ Outside diff range comments (3)</summary><blockquote>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text-input/hx-text-input.ts (3)</summary><blockquote>
> 
> `202-215`: _🧹 Nitpick_ | _🔵 Trivial_
> 
> **Consider triggering validity update when `pattern` changes.**
> 
> If pattern validation is added to `_updateValidity`, also include `'pattern'` in the condition that triggers validity updates:
> 
> 
> 
> <details>
> <summary>♻️ Proposed adjustment</summary>
> 
> ```diff
>      if (
>        changedProperties.has('value') ||
>        changedProperties.has('required') ||
>        changedProperties.has('minlength') ||
> -      changedProperties.has('maxlength')
> +      changedProperties.has('maxlength') ||
> +      changedProperties.has('pattern')
>      ) {
>        this._updateValidity();
>      }
> ```
> </details>
> 
> <details>
> <summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>
> 
> ```
> Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.
> 
> In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text-input/hx-text-input.ts` around
> lines 202 - 215, The updated() lifecycle currently calls this._updateValidity()
> when 'value', 'required', 'minlength', or 'maxlength' change but not when
> 'pattern' changes; add checking for changedProperties.has('pattern') in the same
> conditional so that pattern-based validation triggers _updateValidity() (locate
> the override updated method and the call to this._updateValidity() in
> hx-text-input.ts to make the change).
> ```
> 
> </details>
> 
> ---
> 
> `174-175`: _⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟡 Minor_
> 
> **Non-null assertion violates TypeScript strict mode guidelines.**
> 
> The `!` operator on `_input` violates the coding guideline prohibiting non-null assertions. While this is a common Lit pattern with `@query`,

threadFeedback.agentReasoning: This thread was already evaluated and denied in iteration 1. The feedback targets raw value fallbacks in CSS `var(--token, fallback)` patterns, which are standard defensive CSS — not "hardcoded values." The project's own three-tier design token architecture explicitly shows fallback chaining (`var(--wc-button-bg, var(--wc-color-primary))`). Removing literal fallbacks would cause broken rendering in consumer environments where tokens aren't fully defined. This pattern is consistent with project standards and should not be changed.

The feedback is valid — test artifact files (Playwright `test-results/`) should not be committed to git. This was already fixed in iteration 1: the directory was removed from git tracking via `git rm -r --cached` and `packages/hx-library/test-results/` was added to `.gitignore`. Confirmed: `git ls-files packages/hx-library/test-results/.last-run.json` returns empty (not tracked). The fix is fully in place — no additional implementation needed.
